2308440.name: G-MODEアーカイブス+ 探偵・癸生川凌介事件譚 オリジナル・サウンドトラック
2308440.description:
■The Original Soundtrack for G-MODE Archives+ The Detective Kibukawa Ryosuke JikenTan.

This product is a complete edition containing every piece of music from Vol. 1 to Vol. 10.

The total playing time of discs 1 to 4 is 169 minutes! Please enjoy the world of "The Detective Kibukawa Ryosuke JikenTan" to your heart's content.
